packs.title: Business Point Of Sale Scenes
packs.summary: Reusable commercial scene archetypes for placing products, services, venues, and offers inside realistic customer decision environments.
packs.whenToUse: Use when the user wants to test how a supplied subject appears in purchase, booking, consultation, trial, demo, pickup, handoff, or business sales contexts.

families.title: Boutique Try-On
families.summary: A high-intent retail moment where a customer evaluates a wearable product before purchase.
families.businessGoal: make the subject feel desirable in a try-before-buy retail setting where fit, style, and display quality matter
families.scene: a {tone} boutique retail environment in {market_context} with a try-on bench, product display wall, mirror edge, and staff tray
families.sceneShape: horizontal bench foreground, product display background, customer evaluation cue at center
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject is the hero item on the bench, display riser, tray, or mirror-side stand

subjectSlot.placement: foreground try-on bench or display riser
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} evaluates, handles, tries on, or compares the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a premium offer card or tablet screen on the staff tray
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the app or digital service on a staff tablet beside the product display

families.focus: trial, fit confidence, and premium retail desirability
families.decision: whether this subject should be shown as a boutique try-on or retail launch hero
families.avoid: chaotic retail clutter, copied luxury store identity, unreadable signage, distorted subject shape

families.title: Pharmacy Consultation Counter
families.summary: A pharmacist or advisor-assisted retail moment for wellness, beauty, health, or personal-care products and services.
families.businessGoal: show trust, recommendation, and category credibility at the counter before purchase
families.scene: a {tone} pharmacy or wellness counter in {market_context} with an advisor area, clean shelf context, information mat, and {supporting_objects}
families.sceneShape: service counter across the frame, advisor cue on one side, subject and information surface on the customer side
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject sits near the consultation mat as the recommended item or reviewed offer

subjectSlot.placement: customer-side consultation mat or counter display
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} receives advice or compares options with an advisor
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a printed recommendation card or appointment card
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the app or service flow on a counter tablet

families.focus: expert recommendation and safe retail confidence
families.decision: whether the subject can work in a trust-led pharmacy or wellness retail scene
families.avoid: clinical fear cues, fake prescription labels, crowded shelves, exaggerated health promises

families.title: Grocery Endcap Launch
families.summary: A supermarket endcap or aisle-end display that makes a product visible at a high-traffic decision point.
families.businessGoal: test shelf impact, display readiness, and quick shopper recognition in mass retail
families.scene: a {tone} grocery or mass-retail aisle in {market_context} with an endcap tower, category neighbors, shelf talker placeholders, and clear shopper path
families.sceneShape: vertical endcap tower with subject repetition, aisle depth on one side, one front-facing hero unit at eye level
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject repeats on the endcap while one front-facing unit remains the hero

subjectSlot.placement: eye-level endcap shelf with repeated facings
subjectSlot.scale: retail display hero plus repeated units
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} notices, reaches for, or compares the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as shelf signage or a redemption card attached to the display
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the digital offer as a QR card on the shelf talker

families.focus: visibility, shelf blocking, and impulse recognition
families.decision: whether the product can stand out in a grocery point-of-sale display
families.avoid: fake retailer logos, impossible stacks, chaotic shelves, misleading subject size

families.title: Beauty Counter Consultation
families.summary: A premium counter where the customer samples, compares, and receives guided advice.
families.businessGoal: make the subject feel tactile, premium, and advisor-led without relying on heavy copy
families.scene: a {tone} beauty, fragrance, or personal-care counter in {market_context} with mirrors, tester tray, clean product lineup, advisor hands, and {supporting_objects}
families.sceneShape: countertop vignette with mirror backdrop, small samples arranged around the hero subject
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject sits on the tester tray, central riser, sample card, or advisor mat

subjectSlot.placement: counter tester tray or central riser
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} samples, compares, or receives a recommendation
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a consultation card beside samples
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show a shade finder, booking flow, or offer on a small tablet

families.focus: sampling, sensorial quality, and premium retail service
families.decision: whether the subject should be positioned as a guided counter experience
constraints: do not mimic a specific retailer
families.avoid: overdone glamour, fake before-after proof, cluttered testers, distorted reflections

families.title: Convenience Chilled Case
families.summary: A fast purchase moment where chilled products compete for immediate attention.
families.businessGoal: test whether the subject reads quickly in a dense, high-frequency retail environment
families.scene: a {tone} convenience retail chilled case in {market_context} with clean rows, cool lighting, shelf labels, and a quick reach or comparison cue
families.sceneShape: refrigerated shelf grid with repeated facings and one interaction point
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears in the front row of the chilled case with neighboring placeholders around it

subjectSlot.placement: front row of refrigerated shelf
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} reaches toward, scans, or compares the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a cold-case shelf card or bundle insert
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show a QR offer card on the shelf rail

families.focus: quick recognition and grab-and-go clarity
families.decision: whether the subject works as a convenience retail purchase cue
families.avoid: messy shelves, fake promotions, unreadable pack fronts, generic vending-machine framing

families.title: Electronics Demo Island
families.summary: A demo table where the subject is experienced hands-on before purchase.
families.businessGoal: show usability, comparison, and feature discovery in a realistic assisted-demo environment
families.scene: a {tone} electronics or device retail demo island in {market_context} with product stations, simple spec cards, staff tablet, and clean functional lighting
families.sceneShape: central island table with product stations around it and aisle space in the background
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears at the main demo station with simple comparison placeholders nearby

subjectSlot.placement: main demo station on central island
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} tests, taps, compares, or asks about the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a demo card next to a device or tablet
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the app, UI, or workflow on an approved device frame

families.focus: hands-on trial and product understanding
families.decision: whether the subject benefits from a demo-led retail scene
families.avoid: sci-fi retail, fake certifications, overpacked signage, incorrect scale

families.title: Auto Handover Bay
families.summary: A delivery or handoff moment where a high-value product or service is formally transferred to the customer.
families.businessGoal: make ownership, service quality, and premium completion feel tangible
families.scene: a {tone} showroom or delivery bay in {market_context} with a reveal area, service desk, handoff tray, and architectural lighting
families.sceneShape: wide reveal bay with hero subject centered and handoff desk or tray in foreground
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject, ownership kit, service card, or offer asset appears in the reveal zone or handoff tray

subjectSlot.placement: reveal zone or handoff tray
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} receives, inspects, signs for, or accepts the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a welcome packet, membership card, or delivery folder
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the service confirmation on a delivery tablet

families.focus: handoff, premium service, and completion confidence
families.decision: whether the subject should be framed around ownership handoff instead of shopping
constraints: do not imply unavailable service levels
families.avoid: wedding-style reveal, fake dealership branding, excessive luxury cliches, impossible reflections

families.title: Hotel Check-In Upsell
families.summary: A front-desk moment where a guest considers an upgrade, package, loyalty offer, or service add-on.
families.businessGoal: show how an offer can be introduced naturally during a hospitality service interaction
families.scene: a {tone} hotel or hospitality reception desk in {market_context} with a guest-facing tablet, key-card folder, concierge cue, and lobby backdrop
families.sceneShape: reception counter with tablet or card holder as the offer surface and lobby depth behind it
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied offer, product, service card, or venue asset appears on the guest-facing tablet or key-card folder

subjectSlot.placement: guest-facing tablet, card holder, or key-card folder
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} reviews, accepts, or asks about the offer
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as an upgrade card or concierge recommendation
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the offer on a check-in tablet

families.focus: service-led upsell and guest confidence
families.decision: whether the offer fits a hotel check-in or concierge moment
families.avoid: generic luxury lobby, fake loyalty claims, unreadable tablet UI, crowded front desk

families.title: Airport Duty-Free Sampling
families.summary: A travel retail sampling or display bay for premium gifting, beauty, food, beverage, or convenience products.
families.businessGoal: test international shopper appeal in a high-traffic travel retail environment
families.scene: a {tone} airport or travel retail sampling bay in {market_context} with a product island, generic travel cues, staff tray, and terminal lighting
families.sceneShape: freestanding retail island with hero display on top and travel flow around it
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject sits on the sampling island with tester, sample, or gift cues nearby

subjectSlot.placement: top of freestanding sampling island
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} samples, gifts, compares, or scans the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a travel offer card or counter display
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show a QR card or tablet demo on the sampling island

families.focus: travel gifting, sampling, and premium impulse purchase
families.decision: whether the subject should be positioned for airport or travel retail
constraints: do not invent airport retailer names
avoid passport or boarding-pass personal data
families.avoid: airport chaos, fake luxury logos, stereotyped travelers, cluttered displays

families.title: Cafe Pickup Counter
families.category: Food Service / Cafe And Quick Service
families.summary: A pickup counter moment where a customer receives an order, loyalty offer, packaged product, or add-on.
families.businessGoal: make the subject feel habitual, local, and easy to buy with an existing routine
families.scene: a {tone} cafe or quick-service pickup counter in {market_context} with pickup shelf, order cue, loyalty surface, and morning or daypart light
families.sceneShape: countertop pickup shelf with subject near a handoff point
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears beside the pickup order as the add-on, featured item, or loyalty offer

subjectSlot.placement: pickup shelf or counter beside order handoff
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} receives, adds, scans, or notices the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a loyalty card, booking card, or pickup insert
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the offer as a QR card or app prompt near pickup

families.focus: routine purchase and low-friction add-on behavior
families.decision: whether the subject fits a cafe counter or daily ritual scene
families.avoid: messy countertop, unreadable chalkboards, fake discounts, generic stock coffee mood

families.title: Fitness Studio Front Desk
families.summary: A studio reception moment where a member considers a product, class pass, recovery item, or retail add-on.
families.businessGoal: connect the subject to membership intent, routine, and wellness retail without overclaiming
families.scene: a {tone} fitness, wellness, or studio front desk in {market_context} with check-in tablet, retail shelf, member card cue, and {supporting_objects}
families.sceneShape: front desk plus vertical retail wall, with the subject placed at checkout or check-in
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears beside the check-in tablet, on the retail shelf, or as a front-desk offer card

subjectSlot.placement: front desk, check-in tablet area, or retail shelf
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} checks in, scans, adds, or asks about the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a class card, membership pass, or appointment card
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the service or pass on a check-in tablet

families.focus: membership routine and add-on purchase relevance
families.decision: whether the subject belongs in a fitness studio retail or sign-up moment
constraints: do not make body or health claims
families.avoid: hard-sell gym imagery, fake transformation claims, crowded locker rooms, unsafe supplement cues

families.title: Clinic Consultation Desk
families.summary: A professional consultation desk where a customer reviews an offer, treatment plan, device, or service package.
families.businessGoal: show clarity, trust, and informed decision-making for regulated or advisory services
families.scene: a {tone} clinic, practice, or advisory consultation room in {market_context} with a clean desk, practitioner tablet, generic form placeholder, sample model, and calm light
families.sceneShape: two-seat consultation desk with tablet and physical sample as the central decision surface
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears on the consultation desk as the device, visual aid, service card, or reviewed offer

subjectSlot.placement: consultation desk between advisor and customer
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} reviews, asks, signs, compares, or receives guidance
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a plan card or consent-safe explanation sheet
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the service on a practitioner tablet with generic UI

families.focus: advice, clarity, and responsible decision support
families.decision: whether the subject needs a consultation-led service scene before purchase
families.avoid: medical miracle claims, identifiable patients, scary equipment, overcomplicated paperwork

families.title: Bank Advisory Desk
families.summary: A branch or advisory meeting where a customer reviews a financial product, account package, insurance offer, or business service.
families.businessGoal: make a complex service feel credible, personal, and decision-ready
families.scene: a {tone} financial advisory desk in {market_context} with a customer folder, tablet visualization, advisor pen gesture, privacy screen, and neutral service interior
families.sceneShape: desk-level composition with tablet and folder as the service offer surface
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied service, card, app, or offer visual appears on the tablet or folder area

subjectSlot.placement: tablet or folder on advisory desk
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} reviews, signs, compares, or asks about the service
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a folder insert or advisory card
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show generic app or dashboard placeholders on a tablet

families.focus: trusted advice and considered service selection
families.decision: whether the subject should be sold through advisor-led consultation rather than self-serve checkout
constraints: do not invent rates or guarantees
families.avoid: fake returns, stock-market drama, luxury wealth cliches, unreadable financial text

families.title: Market Stall Sampling
families.summary: An open-market stall where a product is discovered through sampling, texture, freshness, and direct seller interaction.
families.businessGoal: make the subject feel local, tactile, and credible at a small-retail point of sale
families.scene: a {tone} market stall in {market_context} with counter edge, sample tray, generic tag, seller hand, and local retail depth
families.sceneShape: counter stall foreground with samples in a shallow tray and market rows behind
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears on the sample tray or front counter as the featured item

subjectSlot.placement: front counter or sample tray
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} samples, points, compares, or receives the subject
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a local offer card or appointment card on the stall counter
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show a QR order card beside the sample tray

families.focus: sampling, freshness, and local discovery
families.decision: whether the subject benefits from a market-stall or artisanal retail context
families.avoid: tourist postcard framing, messy displays, fake awards, over-saturated food styling

families.title: Telecom Activation Counter
families.summary: A service counter where a customer activates a device, plan, app, payment service, or connectivity offer.
families.businessGoal: show onboarding, trust, and practical service activation at the point of sale
families.scene: a {tone} telecom, device, or payments retail counter in {market_context} with demo stand, service-card placeholders, staff tablet, and clear activation flow
families.sceneShape: counter with device stand and service cards arranged as a step-by-step activation surface
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears on the demo stand, activation mat, service card, or tablet

subjectSlot.placement: demo stand or activation mat on counter
subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} activates, scans, signs up, compares, or receives setup help
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as an activation card with generic steps
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show approved UI or generic activation screen on a device

families.focus: activation clarity and everyday utility
families.decision: whether the subject should be framed as a guided service onboarding moment
families.avoid: fake network claims, cluttered kiosk graphics, personal data, exaggerated technology effects

families.title: Trade Show Demo Booth
families.summary: A booth demo scene where a product, software, device, or service is presented to buyers or partners.

families.sceneShape: booth backwall and waist-high demo counter with the subject centered as the demonstration object
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears on the demo counter, product station, device frame, or presentation surface

subjectSlot.interaction: {customer_type} watches, asks, scans, or receives a demo
subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a demo card, sales one-pager, or booth tablet flow
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show approved UI or generic interface on the demo screen

families.focus: buyer engagement and demo clarity
families.decision: whether the subject is ready for trade show or B2B field-event storytelling

families.title: Real Estate Sales Gallery
families.summary: A sales gallery scene where a buyer evaluates a property, neighborhood plan, membership, or high-value offer.

families.sceneShape: large model table or presentation island with customer and advisor gestures around it
families.subjectPlacement: the supplied subject appears as the offer, brochure, model detail, sample, or presentation asset on the table or screen

subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the service as a generic presentation or map screen

subjectSlot.fallbackIfService: show the service as a consultation card, design package, or room-planning offer
subjectSlot.fallbackIfDigital: show the service as a room-planning tablet screen

families.focus: in-home fit, material quality, and scale confidence
